title: Learning Online: A New Way to Study
passage:
Online Learning

Online learning is a way to study using the internet. Many students learn from home. They use computers or tablets. Some students join classes with teachers. Others study by themselves. Online learning is very popular today.

Students can learn many subjects online. They can study math, science, and languages. There are many videos and games that help students learn. Some websites offer tests to check understanding. Students can learn at their own speed.

One big advantage of online learning is flexibility. Students can choose when to study. They can study in the morning or evening. This is good for people who work or have other activities.

However, online learning also has challenges. Some students miss the classroom. They want to meet teachers and friends. It can be hard to stay focused at home. Students need to find a quiet place to study.

In conclusion, online learning is a great way to study. It is flexible and offers many resources. But students should be careful and stay focused.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What do many students use for online learning?
questions.explanation: Many students use computers or tablets for online learning, as stated in the passage.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is one advantage of online learning?
questions.explanation: The passage mentions flexibility as a big advantage of online learning.

questions.text: Students can learn math and science online.
questions.explanation: The passage states that students can learn many subjects, including math and science.

questions.text: Online learning is only for young students.
questions.explanation: The passage does not mention any age restrictions for online learning.
The passage states that many students learn from home.

vocabulary.meaning: the ability to change plans easily

tactics:
